proof_target.name: REPRESENTS_TERMINAL_DISCHARGE_COMPATIBILITY_PROOF
proof_target.statement: prove that represents_terminal(nf,w), under terminal_unrestricted(w), selected_domain(nf), and terminal_T(nf), preserves discharge semantics: discharge_semantics_selected(nf) = discharge_semantics_unrestricted(w)

bounded_proof_obligations.name: REPRESENTS_TERMINAL_DOMAIN_ALIGNMENT
bounded_proof_obligations.statement: represents_terminal(nf,w) aligns selected terminal representatives with unrestricted terminal witnesses

bounded_proof_obligations.name: DISCHARGE_SEMANTICS_CONGRUENCE_UNDER_REPRESENTS_TERMINAL
bounded_proof_obligations.statement: discharge semantics are invariant under represents_terminal(nf,w)

bounded_proof_obligations.name: SELECTED_UNRESTRICTED_TERMINAL_DISCHARGE_EQUIVALENCE
bounded_proof_obligations.statement: selected terminal discharge and unrestricted terminal discharge denote the same semantic condition under representation

weakest_missing_object.name: DISCHARGE_SEMANTICS_CONGRUENCE_UNDER_REPRESENTS_TERMINAL
weakest_missing_object.statement: prove discharge_semantics_selected(nf) = discharge_semantics_unrestricted(w) from represents_terminal(nf,w) and the terminal hypotheses
weakest_missing_object.role: central congruence lemma needed to turn the compatibility spec into a proof
